summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of PixelCraft company website. All major features working perfectly including hero section with shiny gold text and particle animation, navigation without blog link, all pages routing correctly, contact form functionality, pricing plans, mobile responsive menu, and Apple glassmorphism styling.
passed_tests: Homepage loads instantly with hero section 'We Build Digital Products That Shine'
Shiny gold text animation working with text-gold-shine class
Canvas particle animation system functioning
Navigation bar has all 6 required links (Home, Services, Portfolio, About, Pricing, Contact)
NO Blog link found anywhere in navigation (requirement met)
All navigation links route correctly to respective pages
Services section shows 6 cards with consistent 380px height
Portfolio section shows project cards with category filter
Testimonials section shows multiple testimonial cards
CTA section with 'Start a Conversation' button working
Footer shows correct phone +91 93912 79070 and Tirupati address
Footer has working links for services, company pages, and social media
NO large PIXELCRAFT text at bottom of footer (requirement met)
Contact page form works with all required fields and submission
Contact page shows correct phone and address information
Pricing page shows 3 plans: Starter (49,999), Professional (1,49,999), Enterprise (Custom)
About page shows team members, values, stats, and story sections
Services page shows 6 services with detailed cards
Portfolio page shows projects with working category filter
Mobile responsive menu toggle works perfectly on small viewport
Glass card styling with Apple glassmorphism effect applied
All cards have rounded-2xl corners for Apple-style design
